title: Shared mailbox access request for support rotation
user_message: I joined the weekend support rotation but still cannot open the shared mailbox.
visible_context: Weekend support members may receive shared mailbox access.
Mailbox access requires verification against the rotation roster.

lookup_user: User is active in the Support department.
check_access_policy: Current weekend rotation roster includes Divya Rao through the end of the quarter.

required_facts: Current weekend rotation roster includes Divya Rao through the end of the quarter.
expected_resolution.reason: The user is on the approved roster and should receive mailbox access.

title: Developer requesting local admin for a demo machine
user_message: I need local admin on my laptop today so I can install a driver for an onsite demo.
visible_context: Local admin is restricted on managed laptops.
Hardware driver exceptions are handled by Endpoint Operations.

lookup_device: Device is a managed corporate laptop with admin rights disabled by policy.
check_access_policy: Endpoint policy: local admin exceptions require Endpoint Operations approval and temporary elevation tooling.

required_facts: Endpoint policy: local admin exceptions require Endpoint Operations approval and temporary elevation tooling.
expected_resolution.reason: The agent should not grant admin access directly; it must escalate to the owning team.

title: Impossible travel alert after approved business trip
user_message: My account keeps asking for extra verification because I just landed in Singapore for a customer visit.
visible_context: The user opened the ticket from the same device used last week.
Travel itineraries are synced to the security portal.

lookup_user: User status: active and MFA compliant.
review_login_risk: Security portal shows approved travel to Singapore starting today.
Device fingerprint matches the user's usual managed laptop.

required_facts: Security portal shows approved travel to Singapore starting today.
expected_resolution.reason: This is a known, expected travel scenario rather than a compromise.

title: Contractor requesting Adobe license outside approved scope
user_message: Can you give me a full Adobe Creative Cloud seat for a two-day contractor engagement?
visible_context: Contractor access is controlled by procurement policy.
Short-term contractors may use shared kiosks but not named premium licenses without director approval.

lookup_user: User is a contractor with an end date this week.
check_access_policy: License policy: named premium Adobe seats for contractors require director approval, which is not attached.

required_facts: License policy: named premium Adobe seats for contractors require director approval, which is not attached.
expected_resolution.reason: The request is out of policy and should be denied unless formal approval is provided.

title: Missing payroll dashboard role after department transfer
user_message: I moved from recruiting to payroll this morning and lost access to the payroll operations dashboard.
visible_context: Department changes sync overnight unless manually expedited.
Payroll dashboard access is managed through a role-mapping automation.

lookup_user: HRIS reflects the new payroll role, but IAM still shows the previous recruiting role.
search_kb: KB-284: IAM role sync after People Operations transfers can lag until the nightly job; urgent changes require Identity Operations.
check_access_policy: Payroll dashboard access should be granted automatically after IAM role sync, or manually expedited by Identity Operations.

required_facts: HRIS reflects the new payroll role, but IAM still shows the previous recruiting role.
expected_resolution.reason: The user is entitled, but the role-sync automation needs manual intervention.
